did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review of non-invasive skin imaging methods (dermoscopy, RCM, OCT, etc.) for actinic keratoses. While it cites a reference regarding AI-based approaches to RCM image analysis (Ref 86), the paper itself does not use AI/ML to obtain its results; it discusses clinical and histological aspects and imaging techniques generally.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
